tldr_zh: NASA拯救老舊衛星，阿里巴巴禁用Claude，伊朗為哈米尼舉辦葬禮引國際關注。
tldr_en: NASA launches Swift Observatory rescue mission; Alibaba bans Claude Code; Iran holds major funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei.

items.title_zh: NASA啟動緊急任務拯救Swift天文台免被焚毀
items.title_en: NASA Launches Emergency Mission to Save Swift Observatory from Burning Up
items.summary_zh: NASA委託Katalyst Space Technologies於週五發射Link航天器，試圖拯救2004年發射的Swift天文台。該天文台因近期太陽風暴導致軌道下降，有可能在今年內進入地球大氣層並焚毀。這是首次嘗試用商業航天器進行此類救援任務。
items.summary_en: NASA enlisted Katalyst Space Technologies to launch the Link spacecraft on Friday to intercept and save the Swift Observatory, launched in 2004. Recent solar storms have lowered its orbit, threatening it with burning up in Earth's atmosphere within the year. This represents an innovative approach to satellite rescue using commercial space technology.

items.title_zh: 白宮刪除能源保護網頁　遭批政治動作
items.title_en: White House Deletes Energy Conservation Web Pages During Heatwave
items.summary_zh: 美國能源部據報刪除約6,000個與能源保護相關的網頁，時機恰逢美國經歷歷史性熱浪。此舉遭批評為政治性刪除，因共和黨人反對紐約市長建議民眾將冷氣設定在華氏78度以減輕電網壓力。
items.summary_en: The US Department of Energy reportedly deleted approximately 6,000 pages on energy conservation while a historic heatwave strikes the country. The timing appears politically motivated, following Republican outcry over a New York mayor's request for residents to set AC to 78°F to reduce grid strain.

items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴將Claude Code列為高風險　禁止員工使用
items.title_en: Alibaba Bans Employees from Using Claude Code, Classifies as High-Risk
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴已將Anthropic的Claude Code列為高風險軟體，禁止員工使用。此舉反映中國科技企業對美國AI工具的警惕，同時凸顯全球AI工具採納中的地緣政治緊張局勢。
items.summary_en: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software and banned its employees from using it. This reflects heightened caution among Chinese tech companies toward American AI tools and underscores geopolitical tensions in global AI adoption.

items.title_zh: Midjourney訴訟案中促好萊塢揭露AI使用細節
items.title_en: Midjourney Seeks to Compel Hollywood Studios to Disclose AI Usage Details
items.summary_zh: 在與三家好萊塢製片廠的法律糾紛中，Midjourney要求這些工作室揭露其AI使用細節。此案反映出AI版權與使用權問題的複雜性，以及內容創作產業與AI開發者之間的對抗。
items.summary_en: As part of ongoing litigation with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal details of their own AI usage. This case highlights the complexity of AI copyright and usage rights issues, as well as tensions between content creators and AI developers.

items.title_zh: Linux核心曝高風險漏洞Bad Epoll　Android也受影響
items.title_en: Linux Kernel Flaw Bad Epoll Poses High Risk to Android and Servers
items.summary_zh: 研究人員發現Linux核心epoll子系統存在編號CVE-2026-46242的本機權限提升漏洞，CVSS嚴重度評分為7.8分。漏洞源於競態條件導致的使用後釋放，攻擊者可將無特權程序提升為root權限。該漏洞影響Linux桌面、伺服器與Android系統。
items.summary_en: Security researchers discovered a high-severity local privilege escalation vulnerability (CVE-2026-46242) in Linux kernel's epoll subsystem with a CVSS score of 7.8. The flaw stems from a use-after-free condition caused by race conditions, allowing attackers to escalate unprivileged processes to root level. It affects Linux desktops, servers, and Android systems.

items.title_zh: AWS推出Graviton5處理器　M9g執行個體效能提升25%
items.title_en: AWS Launches Graviton5 Processor with 25% Performance Gain in M9g Instances
items.summary_zh: AWS推出自研Arm架構處理器Graviton5，首批搭載該晶片的M9g執行個體已上線。相較前代M8g，M9g在通用運算效能上提升25%，在Web應用、機器學習及資料庫工作負載上表現更佳。
items.summary_en: AWS unveiled its custom-designed Arm-based Graviton5 processor with new M9g compute instances now available. M9g shows a 25% performance improvement over the previous M8g generation, with particularly strong gains in web applications, machine learning, and database workloads.

items.title_zh: Google新廣告想象AI協助起草獨立宣言
items.title_en: Google Commercial Imagines Declaration of Independence Written with AI Help
items.summary_zh: Google發布新廣告，想象美國建國250年前若建國先父們能使用Google Workspace AI工具會如何。廣告創意地融合歷史與現代AI技術，展示Google Workspace在企業協作中的應用。
items.summary_en: Google released a new commercial imagining what the Declaration of Independence might look like if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace AI tools. The creative ad merges historical elements with modern AI technology to showcase Google's productivity suite.

items.title_zh: 美國極端熱浪取消獨立日慶祝活動　1.65億人受影響
items.title_en: Record Heatwave Cancels July 4th Celebrations Across US, Affects 165 Million
items.summary_zh: 美國經歷危險的高溫和濕度，超過1.65億人受影響。預計未來數天溫度將維持在攝氏38度（華氏100度）。華盛頓、費城等多地因極端氣候取消獨立日慶祝活動。
items.summary_en: A dangerous heatwave is affecting more than 165 million Americans, with temperatures expected to remain at 38°C (100°F) for several days. Multiple Fourth of July celebrations from DC to Philadelphia have been canceled due to the extreme weather conditions.

items.title_zh: 烏克蘭攻擊聖彼得堡主要油輪碼頭　切斷俄戰爭資金
items.title_en: Ukraine Strikes Major Russian Oil Terminal in St. Petersburg
items.summary_zh: 烏克蘭總統澤倫斯基表示，烏克蘭已攻擊俄羅斯聖彼得堡的主要油輪碼頭。該目標是關鍵基礎設施，是俄羅斯戰爭經費的重要來源。此舉是烏克蘭進一步削弱俄羅斯經濟的戰略。
items.summary_en: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky announced that Ukraine has struck a major oil terminal in Russia's St. Petersburg, targeting key infrastructure that generates revenue for Russia's war effort. The attack represents Ukraine's strategy to weaken Russia's economic capacity.

items.title_zh: 伊朗最高領袖哈米尼國葬展開　德黑蘭民眾悼念
items.title_en: Iran Holds Massive Funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei
items.summary_zh: 伊朗於美國獨立250週年之際為現代史上執政最久的領導人哈米尼舉行大規模葬禮。大量民眾湧入德黑蘭瞻仰靈柩，部分民眾高喊對以色列和美國復仇的口號。哈米尼遺體將於德黑蘭安置至週一，隨後赴伊朗及伊拉克各地巡遊。
items.summary_en: Iran is holding a massive funeral for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei, the longest-serving leader in modern Iranian history. Large crowds gathered in Tehran's Grand Mosalla, with some chanting slogans calling for revenge against Israel and the US. His body will lie in state until Monday before traveling across Iran and Iraq.
